title: Expose MCP read-only frontdoor
goal: Expose ask context build and answer grounding verify over MCP after CLI/Core semantics are stable.

acceptance.assertion: MCP tools/resources are read-only and never trigger implicit snapshot_create.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: MCP output uses the same request/context/verdict semantics as CLI/Core.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: MCP boundary forbids Git, shell, patch, PR, auto-review, auto-fix, auto-merge and secret-read actions.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: MCP smoke or contract tests cover ask context and grounding verification shapes.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.unblocked_by: RBGV-V1-T006 verified via Lenskit PR #936; dependencies RBGV-V1-T003, RBGV-V1-T005 and RBV1-T010 are verified.
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #937: MCP-shaped read-only frontdoor handlers ask_context and grounding_verify with shared CLI/Core semantics and no snapshot_create side effects.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t007-readonly-mcp: repobrief_mcp_tools.ask_context and grounding_verify report writes=[]; tests assert no snapshot_create call and no bundle writes.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t007-shared-semantics: ask_context reports repobrief.ask_request.v1 / repobrief.ask_context_pack.v1; grounding_verify reports answer_grounding declaration/verdict semantics.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t007-boundary: repobrief-mcp-boundary.md and read-only boundary forbid Git, shell, patch, PR, auto-review, auto-fix, auto-merge and secret_read.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t007-smoke: test_repobrief_mcp_frontdoor.py covers ask context and grounding verification shapes.

checks: Lenskit PR #937 CI all green before merge
